_source: Feishu doc '亚马逊批量上传表格字段规则' (wiki OwwywNuXcifxJ4k9XBbcod8Bnnc, block ldxfcqD0XQNtTRZS). This is the AUTHORITATIVE rule source for field filling — it OVERRIDES any Keepa/web-derived value. Match entries to template fields by `label` (Data Definitions Local Label) or `attr` (attribute substring).

fixed_defaults.label: Product Id Type
fixed_defaults.note: multi-variant: fill on CHILD rows only; parent leaves Product Id Type / Product Id blank

blank_rules._note: In ALL categories, regardless of whether the product actually has batteries, treat as 'no battery': leave every battery-related field blank. Exception: 'Are batteries required?' is set to 'No' (see fixed_defaults). Applies to base attribute names containing: battery, lithium, number_of_lithium, cell_composition, un_number, hazmat (battery aspect).

sku.pattern: 3 groups of uppercase alphanumeric, each 2-4 chars, joined by '-'. Unique across the batch.

product_id_upc.uniqueness: web-search the generated UPC; only use it if there are NO results, else regenerate.
product_id_upc.brand_not_in_table: do NOT generate a UPC; leave Product Id blank and HIGHLIGHT the row in the output/report.
product_id_upc.check_digit_note: The doc says 'last 6 random'. A valid UPC-A requires a check digit, so the generator uses prefix(6)+random(5)+computed check digit(1). Confirm if you'd rather keep 6 fully-random digits.

generation_rules.ram_memory_maximum_size: computer categories, multi-variant: fill using the child with the largest value's unit

parent_row: Variation Theme Name = same as all children
Item Name = product family name (no config attributes)
no UPC/EAN/GTIN (Product Id + Product Id Type blank)
child_row: Variation Theme Name = identical to parent
each sellable child has its own Product Id (or explicit GTIN Exempt)
children fill price, inventory, images, compliance info
every attribute in the variation theme must be fully filled per child
